subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of this captive servant! His honor Taraz and his honor Ali-Akbar spent the days of Ridvan in that village [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران این عبد مسجون حضرت طراز و حضرت علی اکبر ایام رضوانرا در آن قریه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
